title: CEL – Consultant – 1 Posts
shortInfo: CEL Consultant (D&AR) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for 1 post such as Consultant (D&AR) vacancy for eligible Graduate candidates preferably with Law, Personnel Management or Industrial Relations qualification and relevant experience, with the application window offline open till 03-06-2026 on celindia.co.in.
